overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character walking through a rain-soaked urban environment at night. The character proceeds along sidewalks and streets, crossing at an intersection with a large digital billboard, while heading toward an illuminated downtown skyline with modern glass skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with palm trees approaching intersection

events.description: vehicle with headlights passes by on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk toward the intersection, with a large digital billboard visible ahead

entered.detail: line of palm trees along the sidewalk edge
large rotating digital advertisement structure at the intersection ahead
tall glass skyscraper with yellow-green lighting dominating the skyline
tall street light illuminating the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet concrete sidewalk lined with palm trees on the left, approaching an urban intersection at night. A large cylindrical digital billboard and an illuminated skyscraper are visible in the distance, while a vehicle passes by on the street to the right.

events.description: steps off sidewalk and begins crossing the street at the crosswalk
passes two pedestrians while crossing the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection, passing between two pedestrians while heading toward the cylindrical billboard structure

notable_agents.action: female pedestrian walking in the opposite direction across the crosswalk
male pedestrian walking ahead in the same direction, then passed by ego

entered.detail: white striped pedestrian crossing on the asphalt
low concrete wall separating the road from the sidewalk on the far side

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street at the intersection, moving from the sidewalk onto the asphalt crosswalk. Two pedestrians are encountered and passed during the crossing. The cylindrical billboard moves to the left as the character progresses, and a concrete road barrier appears on the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated urban roadway with concrete barriers

events.description: turns right at the intersection and proceeds along the road toward downtown

agents.ego_description: walking along the roadway toward the illuminated downtown skyline, with vehicles occasionally passing by

entered.detail: wooden utility pole with power lines running along the road
low-rise industrial structure with dark facade

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the character turns and proceeds along an elevated roadway with concrete barriers on the right. The illuminated skyscraper remains visible ahead as the dominant landmark, while utility poles and industrial buildings line the route. Vehicles pass by occasionally on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach road to downtown with grassy shoulders

agents.ego_description: continuing along the worn asphalt road toward the brightly lit downtown area, with grassy areas now visible on the roadside

entered.detail: patches of grass and dirt along the edge of the road replacing concrete barriers
illuminated commercial signs visible on distant buildings

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the road as it transitions to a more open area with grassy shoulders replacing the concrete barriers. The downtown skyline with its illuminated towers grows larger ahead, and neon signage becomes visible on distant buildings to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked urban district that gradually opens up toward a luminous downtown skyline. It begins with the character walking along a wet concrete sidewalk lined with palm trees, moving toward a distant cylindrical digital billboard and an illuminated skyscraper. As the character crosses the asphalt intersection and passes other pedestrians, the billboard shifts to the left and a concrete road barrier emerges on the right. The scene then transitions onto an elevated roadway where the camera follows the character past utility poles and industrial buildings, keeping the dominant skyscraper centered in the frame. Finally, the concrete barriers give way to open grassy shoulders as the character advances toward the expanding skyline and the glow of distant neon signage.
